title: Register of Services Provided and Services (Valstybės duomenų agentūra)
description:
[Publisher: Valstybės duomenų agentūra] Register of services provided
The register of AB Šiaulių energija accumulates data on the services provided and the quantities consumed by them from 2017. The package includes the service name, category, amount of service consumption and unit of measure (kWh, m3, m2, units, etc.), period month and room ID (referenced to the table “Services”).
Premises
Information about the premises and buildings where the services of AB Šiaulių energija are provided. The set includes the area of the premises, the year of construction of the building, the number of floors, the type and purpose of the building. In order to ensure confidentiality, the records of the coordinates provided are modified by adding random values such as noise.

Contact the atverimas@stat.gov.lt for technical questions or possible errors.
